title: Automate report creation from updates added to the Monday board
excerpt: Weekly project updates are getting added on a common Monday board, across multiple project. How can I automate the generation of reports from these updates, which can then be send to leadership?

posts.author: Kirti (Kirti)
posts.cookedHtml: Weekly project updates are getting added on a common Monday board, across multiple project. How can I automate the generation of reports from these updates, which can then be send to leadership?

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Kirti ,
Unfortunately, there’s no native way to report on monday.com updates. However, if you’re open to the apps, there’s Board Email Reports app that can address your case, since it has a set of reports for item updates:

image2047×675 83.5 KB

You will see the following types of reports:

  • Updates by a specific employee
  • Updates mentioning a specific employee
  • Updates containing attachments
  • Status updates
  • Last updates

The app consolidates item updates over a specific period and automatically delivers them via email with a roundup of changes and detailed xls-report as an attachment. This is how it looks:

image424×469 24.9 KB

image1461×507 92.8 KB

You can test the app for free and find out if it works for you. We can make a custom automation rule, just tell your request to our team.

posts.author: kevinfantasymedia (Kevin - Fantasy Media LTD)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Kirti
